creator: xistence@0x58.com
text:
Hey,

I've been closely watching for changes surrounding archives/p7zip which is marked as vulnerable here:
https://vuxml.freebsd.org/freebsd/6d337396-0e4a-11e8-94c0-5453ed2e2b49.html

This commit states MFH: 2018Q1
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=461380

However this has not yet happened:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/branches/2018Q1/archivers/p7zip/?

This means quarterly packages repositories don't yet have an updated package.
